---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for SCR1B3
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that SCR1B3 makes hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Notes

SCR1B3 is telemetry-free and account-free by design. Features that require
telemetry, remote accounts, or sending your file contents off-device are out
of scope. Customization is config-driven first; code-loading extensions are
capability-sandboxed and opt-in.
